title: Evangelion phrases

chunks.content:
Article: Evangelion phrases
[]: Evangelion phrases Post by Kaminoyouni » Fri Jun 08, 2007 2:12 pm after speaking with Mr.Tines, i made this thread in which we could take everyday phrases and add an Eva twist to it, such as "EoE great mind fuck or greatest mind fuck?"

[]: Post by Executor » Fri Jun 08, 2007 2:20 pm I would not go so far as to say that EoE is THE definative mind-fuck of all time, but it's up there.

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jun 08, 2007 2:49 pm You know, at this point it's hard to imagine that EoE ever seemed like a mindfuck in the first place. It's like trying to remember a time before you could speak.

[]: Post by Executor » Fri Jun 08, 2007 2:55 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: You know, at this point it's hard to imagine that EoE ever seemed like a mindfuck in the first place. It's like trying to remember a time before you could speak.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jun 09, 2007 12:27 am All I remember is watching it, and then setting in my chair with my jaw on the floor for a good 10 minutes after the credits quit rolling... Probably the closest I've ever been to feeling like I'd been run over by a semi-truck. It's that uber-heavy dazed and confused feeling... Now I know what Zeppelin meant by that song.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 09, 2007 1:04 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: All I remember is watching it, and then setting in my chair with my jaw on the floor for a good 10 minutes after the credits quit rolling...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 09, 2007 1:19 am Bitches, Topic. Topic, Bitches. You two play nice while daddy goes to the store.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jun 09, 2007 1:26 am NAveryW wrote: 10 minutes after the credits quit rolling, the second half of the movie had just gotten into full swing... :(

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 09, 2007 5:24 pm With

Article: Evangelion phrases
veryW wrote: 10 minutes after the credits quit rolling, the second half of the movie had just gotten into full swing... :(

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 09, 2007 5:24 pm With both EoTV and EoE, though I knew what to except due to reading spoilers (*cough* Evaotaku as well as some kick arse site called Guide to Evangelion I was young and foolish then *cough*) I knew what to expect, but that didn't stop me from going, "WTF" after watching both. I think my brain actually shut down for 5 minutes as I tried to comprehend what the hell I just watched. ^^;

[]: Post by slothen » Sat Jun 09, 2007 5:27 pm phrases eh? how bout: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!1

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Jun 11, 2007 4:59 am Shinji MAH BOOOIIIIII!

[]: Post by drinian » Mon Jun 11, 2007 11:18 am I picked up a little keyfob in Akihabara that very loudly says "ANTA BAKA???" when you hit a button.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Jun 11, 2007 12:12 pm "When life gives you Eva, run screaming through the nearest open window"

[]: Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 11, 2007 7:50 pm "When life gives you opportunity, take it or risk sitting with those bitches!'

[]: Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Jun 11, 2007 8:14 pm "when life gives you lemons, make LCL then sit back and let the world wonder how you did it."

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jun 11, 2007 8:43 pm @ Sachiel_13 You should move that pic to the Captions Contest thread!! :)

[]: Post by slothen » Mon Jun 11, 2007 8:55 pm done

[]: Post by Opteron-O3 » Mon Jun 11, 2007 9:01 pm The fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth. It's my favorite! It just gives me chills saying it.
